qa_pairs.question: Why are scaling tests recommended before launching long Ansys jobs on Alliance clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: Scaling tests are recommended to determine the optimal scalable job size, minimize total job run and startup times, and ensure the efficient use of limited licences and hardware.

qa_pairs.question: What could happen if an Ansys parallel job on an Alliance cluster doesn't achieve at least 50% CPU utilization?
qa_pairs.answer: If an Ansys parallel job does not achieve at least 50% CPU utilization, it will likely be flagged by the system, which will result in a followup by an Alliance team member.
